prompt_inputs.goal: Complete a 20km early morning run with optimal energy availability and post-run recovery nutrition

solution_criteria: Includes pre-run meal (consumed 2-3 hours before early morning run) with easily digestible carbohydrates
Includes post-run recovery meal within 30-60 minutes with carbohydrates and protein
Daily calorie and macronutrient targets appropriate for marathon training with high carbohydrate emphasis
All meals are practical to prepare and consume within typical athlete time constraints
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a marathon runner requiring high-calorie, carbohydrate-dense meals with specific timing around training (early morning 20km run), to verify the meal plan optimizes energy availability, recovery nutrition, and practical food preparation within time constraints
